Our Journey

Watch Our Story

Experience the energy and excellence of NX+ Sports across Mumbai and Pune

About the Award

Honoring Excellence.
Inspiring Tomorrow.

NX+ Sports Excellence Awards by Cluster XO is a prestigious platform dedicated to recognizing coaches who go beyond the field — mentors who inspire, guide and shape the next generation of athletes across India.

The award ceremony also serves as a powerful networking platform connecting passionate coaches and progressive schools with NX+ programs — summer camps, educational tours, post-school activities and sports events.

Now in its 2nd edition in Pune — after a successful inaugural edition in Mumbai Division — the awards are set to inspire champions across Maharashtra and beyond.

Apply Now →

Inspire the next generation by honoring those who dedicate their lives to nurturing young athletes.

Build a stronger sports ecosystem by bringing schools, coaches and organizations under one platform.

Our Programs

What NX+ Offers Schools

Partner with NX+ to bring world-class sports experiences to your school community.

☀️

Summer Camp

Multi-sport summer camps with 30+ activities — cricket, swimming, dance, gymnastics and more.

✈️

Educational Tours

Curated sports educational tours giving students exposure to professional sports environments.

🏫

Post School Activity

Structured after-school sports programs keeping students active, disciplined and engaged.

🏟️

Sports Events

Inter-school tournaments and competitive events professionally organized by NX+.

🎯

Coaching Programs

Expert-led coaching clinics and workshops across multiple sports disciplines.

🤝

School Partnerships

Long-term partnerships integrating NX+ expertise into your school sports curriculum.
